title: The Mirror Of Or
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper. or_elim(A, B, B ∨ A) cases; build B ∨ A with or_intro_right / or_intro_left. (2) Uses or_comm. implication_intro then P := A ∨ B ⊢ B ∨ A; by or_comm(A, B, P);. (3) Uses or_comm_imp. biconditional_intro cases; by or_comm_imp(A, B); and by or_comm_imp(B, A);.
